title: Semantic Type Registry
description: Kernel vocabulary plus project-specific discovered semantic types. Stored at .work/semantic-loop/semantic-types.json.

type_id.description: PascalCase type name, e.g. 'Action' or a project-specific type like 'BatchImportJob'.

parent_type.description: type_id of the parent type for specializations; null for kernel roots.

detection_rules.description: Operational rules describing which source constructs indicate this type.

required_evidence.description: Evidence kinds that MUST be present for a node of this type to be instantiated.

examples.description: Examples from THIS repository (source node ids or paths). Required for proposed project-specific types.

confidence.description: Confidence that the type itself is a real, distinct concept in this repository. Kernel types may leave this null.

status.description: Only accepted or validated types may back stable constructs in the final report.
